description:
Add notification preference toggles to the Settings page and the backend storage.

## Requirements

### Backend
- Extend the profiles API to support `notification_prefs` JSONB field
- If the column doesn't exist in the profiles table, add it via a Supabase migration:
  ```sql
  ALTER TABLE profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notification_prefs JSONB DEFAULT '{"task_assigned": true, "task_approval": true, "shift_changes": true, "guest_list_changes": true}';
  ```
- API endpoint to GET/PUT notification_prefs for the current user
- Default: all enabled

### Frontend (`src/app/settings/page.tsx`)
Add a new card/section:

**"Notifications" Card — toggle switches for:**
- "Task assigned to me" (task_assigned)
- "Task approval needed" (task_approval)
- "Shift changes" (shift_changes)
- "Guest list changes" (guest_list_changes)

Each toggle:
- Uses the existing Switch component from shadcn/ui
- Shows a label and short description
- Immediately saves on toggle (no separate "Save" button needed)
- Shows loading state while saving
- Shows error toast on failure

### Tests
- Toggles render with correct default values (all enabled)
- Toggling a switch persists the change (verifiable via re-fetch)
- Error state shows toast
- Loading state disables toggles

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
